cover: System architecture diagram: 'Llama 4 Scout on-Premise + Salesforce'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'Llama 4 Scout on-Premise + Salesforce'. Subtitle 'When open source beats hosted AI for regulated enterprise workflows'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'Salesforce Experience' (pastel blue): modules 'Agentforce 2.0 Agent', 'Service Console LWC', 'Flow Action'. LAYER 2 'Secure Integration' (pastel teal): modules 'Named Credential', 'Apex Invocable Action', 'Private API Gateway'. LAYER 3 'On-Prem AI Runtime' (pastel green): modules 'Llama 4 Scout', 'Vector Index', 'Audit Logger'. Central node 'Policy + Data Boundary' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER (upper right): 'Data Cloud Vector Search' and 'MuleSoft / PrivateLink'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Decision Criteria': sub-modules 'Data Residency', 'Latency', 'Cost', 'Model Control' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'When Llama 4 Scout Belongs in Salesforce'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'When Llama 4 Scout Belongs in Salesforce'. Subtitle 'Use open source for boundaries, not bragging rights'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Data Residency with shield icon', 'High Volume Classification with queue icon', 'Private RAG with document lock icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD ROUTING' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD ROUTING' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: if (caseBody.contains('SSN')) callHostedModel(caseBody); right column green border '// GOOD' code: if (containsPii(caseBody)) callOnPremLlama(caseBody); else callAgentforce(caseId); BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Keep PII local', 'Route by risk', 'Log every inference'. Footer bar: 'Open source is a control strategy, not a default religion'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Salesforce to On-Prem Llama Gateway Contract'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Salesforce to On-Prem Llama Gateway Contract'. Subtitle 'Keep Apex simple and enforce safety at the boundary'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Named Credential with key icon', 'JSON Schema with braces icon', 'Audit Event with log icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD CONTRACT' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD CONTRACT' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: req.setBody(case.Description + case.SSN__c + case.Bank_Account__c); right column green border '// GOOD' code: payload.put('caseId', c.Id); payload.put('caseText', redact(c.Description)); payload.put('schemaVersion', 'case-classification-v1'); BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Redact before inference', 'Return JSON only', 'Block direct writes'. Footer bar: 'The gateway is your AI security perimeter'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
